title: Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates:
Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates!
